title: FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET - 211info
text: HOPE ON THE HILL FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A shopping-style pantry and clothing closet (items may include adult and children's clothing and personal care items). One food box or clothing closet visit a month per family. 500 NW Hill Road McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Food Pantry: Tuesday 11am-1pm, Thursday 6pm-8pm Clothing Closet: Saturday 10am-noon Donations: Tuesday 11am-1pm, Thursday 6pm-8pm or by appointment Email (503) 472-8476 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 472-8476 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Tuesday 11am-1pm, Thursday 6pm-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Food pantry located in the building across from the church's lower parking lot 500 NW Hill Road Services: Clothing Donation Programs Food Donation Programs Food Pantries General Clothing Provision Personal/Grooming Supplies Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOPE ON THE HILL
